traits.locale_text:
Solomorne's Perception and Fellowship are reduced by −5 if at the start of his turn, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his line of sight or if the familiar is deactivated.
This augment malfunctions while Solomorne is suffering from {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}. Solomorne and the cyber-mastiff's dodge is reduced by −30%.

Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

Solomorne's Perception and Fellowship are reduced by −5 if at the start of his turn, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his line of sight or if the familiar is deactivated.
This augment malfunctions while Solomorne is suffering from a {g|f:30820d5aef9b4251af7579722dc95307}concussion{/g}. Solomorne and the cyber-mastiff's dodge is reduced by −30%.

Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.
This {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augment{/g} malfunctions while Solomorne is suffering from a {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}concussion{/g}. Solomorne and the cyber-mastiff's {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}dodge{/g} is reduced by −30%.

languages.text: {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятие{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g} Соломона снижены на −5, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} кибермастиф не находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} или фамильяр деактивирован.
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятие{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g} Соломона снижены на −5, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} кибермастиф не находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} или фамильяр деактивирован.
Этот {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} выходит из строя, пока на Соломона наложена {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузия{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Уклонение{/g} Соломона и кибермастифа снижено на −30%.

{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Восприятие{/g} и {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Общительность{/g} Соломона снижены на −5, если в начале его {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}хода{/g} кибермастиф не находится в его {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}зоне видимости{/g} или фамильяр деактивирован.
Этот {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}аугмент{/g} выходит из строя, пока на Соломона наложена {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}контузия{/g}. {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Уклонение{/g} Соломона и кибермастифа снижено на −30%.

languages.text: Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g} wird um –5 reduziert, wenn der Cyber-Mastiff zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} nicht in seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} steht oder der Vertraute deaktiviert ist.
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
Solomornes {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Wahrnehmung{/g} und {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Gefolgschaft{/g} wird um –5 reduziert, wenn der Cyber-Mastiff zu Beginn seines {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}Zuges{/g} nicht in seiner {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}Sichtlinie{/g} steht oder der Vertraute deaktiviert ist.
Diese {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}Augmentation{/g} funktioniert nicht, solange Solomorne mit {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Erschütterung{/g} belegt ist. Der {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Ausweichen{/g}-Wert von Solomorne und seinem Cyber-Mastiff wird um −30 % reduziert.

languages.text: La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g} de Solomorne sont réduites de −5 si le cyber-mastiff ne se trouve pas dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} ou si le familier est désactivé.
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} et la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sociabilité{/g} de Solomorne sont réduites de −5 si le cyber-mastiff ne se trouve pas dans sa {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}ligne de mire{/g} au début de son {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}tour{/g} ou si le familier est désactivé.
Cette {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}augmentation{/g} souffre de défaillances si Solomorne est victime de {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}Commotion cérébrale{/g}. Son {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}Esquive{/g} et celle du cyber-mastiff sont réduites de −30 %.

languages.text: 索罗蒙{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，若生化獒犬不在其{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内或被停用，他的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}社交{/g}降低5点。
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
索罗蒙{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}回合{/g}开始时，若生化獒犬不在其{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}视线{/g}内或被停用，他的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}感知{/g}和{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}社交{/g}降低5点。
索罗蒙处于{g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}震荡{/g}状态时，此{g|Encyclopedia:Augment}植入物{/g}陷入故障。索罗蒙和生化獒犬的{g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}闪避{/g}降低30%。

languages.text: La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} y la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g} de Solomorne se reducen en −5 si al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} el cibermastín no está dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} o si el familiar ha quedado desactivado.
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
La {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Percepción{/g} y la {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Empatía{/g} de Solomorne se reducen en −5 si al comienzo de su {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turno{/g} el cibermastín no está dentro de su {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}línea de visión{/g} o si el familiar ha quedado desactivado.
Este {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}aumento{/g} sufre una avería mientras Solomorne tenga una {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}conmoción{/g}. La {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}esquiva{/g} de Solomorne y de su cibermastín se reducen un −30 %.

languages.text: ソロモーンの{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}知覚{/g} と{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}仲間{/g} は、{g|Encyclopedia:Turn}ターンの開始時{/g} 、{g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}視線上にサイ バー・マスティフがない場合{/g} 、あるいは親しい者が解除されている場合、-5される。
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

languages.text: Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} nitelikleri, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattı{/g} içerisinde siber mastif bulunmuyorsa veya iye devre dışıysa 5'er puan azalır.
languages.original_text: Solomorne's {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Perception{/g} and {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Fellowship{/g} are reduced by −5 if at the start of his {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turn{/g}, he does not have the cyber-mastiff in his {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}line of sight{/g} or if the familiar is deactivated.

traits.locale_text:
Solomorne'un {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerPerception}Algı{/g} ve {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerFellowship}Sosyallik{/g} nitelikleri, {g|Encyclopedia:Turn}turu{/g} başladığında {g|Encyclopedia:LineOfSight}görüş hattı{/g} içerisinde siber mastif bulunmuyorsa veya iye devre dışıysa 5'er puan azalır.
Bu {g|Encyclopedia:Augment}ogment{/g}, Solomorne bir {g|Encyclopedia:ConcussionEffect}sarsıntıdan{/g} muzdaripse arızalanır. Solomorne ve siber mastifin {g|Encyclopedia:DodgeGlossary}kaçınma{/g} değerleri %30 azalır.
